name: query_tool_log
description: Query the tool-call log (.specify/runtime/tool-calls.jsonl) for coverage of a spec's DoD items. Wraps evidence-tool-log-bridge.sh, which v6.0 promotes to the MCP-primary structured-evidence path — when MCP is registered, this is the canonical way to ask 'does the tool-log already contain evidence that satisfies DoD item X?' without scanning markdown. The response is a JSON envelope with per-match provenance (scope file, line, DoD body, matched command, timestamp, overlap tokens). The traditional markdown ≥10-line raw-output evidence path remains accepted.

log_path.description: Optional override of the tool-call log path. Default is .specify/runtime/tool-calls.jsonl.
